title: Missed rewrite to bulk operators in simple SQL UDF
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(d Date, value Decimal(10, 2));
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY, 2.5);
CREATE FUNCTION test(d1 Date, d2 Date) RETURNS Decimal(10, 2) AS (epochMilli = toUnixTimestamp(d1) - toUnixTimestamp(d2) * 1000);
key_bug_features: Returning multiplied value from SQL UDF triggers MAL loop
